title: Plant In A Jar
description: Plant In A Jar is a mod that lets you grow any Minecraft plant (Trees, Crops, etc) inside a 1x1x1 jar.
body:
Plant In A Jar is a mod that lets you grow any Minecraft plant (Trees, Crops, etc) inside a 1x1x1 jar.

![Showcase](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CoolMineman/Plant-In-A-Jar/master/showcase.png)
